de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class SemisequentChangeInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.SemisequentChangeInfo

  • public class SemisequentChangeInfo
extends Object
    Records the changes made to a semisequent. Keeps track of added and removed formula to the semisequents.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ImmutableList<SequentFormula> added
      contains the added formulas to the semisequent
      private int lastFormulaIndex 
      private ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> modified
      contains the modified formulas from the semisequent
      private ImmutableList<SequentFormula> modifiedSemisequent
      stores the redundance free formula list of the semisequent
      private ImmutableList<SequentFormula> rejected
      contains formulas that have been tried to add, but which have been rejected due to already existing formulas in the sequent subsuming these formulas
      private ImmutableList<SequentFormula> removed
      contains the removed formulas from the semisequent

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      SemisequentChangeInfo() 
      SemisequentChangeInfo(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> formulas) 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addedFormula(int idx, SequentFormula cf)
      logs an added formula at position idx
      ImmutableList<SequentFormula> addedFormulas()
      returns the list of all added constrained formulas
      void combine(SemisequentChangeInfo succ)
      This method combines this change information from this info and its successor.
      ImmutableList<SequentFormula> getFormulaList()
      returns the list of constrained formula of the new semisequent
      int getIndex()
      returns the index of the last added formula
      boolean hasChanged()
      returns true if the semisequent has changed
      void modifiedFormula(int idx, FormulaChangeInfo fci)
      logs a modified formula at position idx
      ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> modifiedFormulas()
      returns the list of all modification positions
      void rejectedFormula(SequentFormula f)
      adding formula f to the semisequent failed due to a redundance check.
      ImmutableList<SequentFormula> rejectedFormulas()
      returns a list of formulas that have been tried to add to the semisequent but got rejected as they were redundant
      void removedFormula(int idx, SequentFormula cf)
      logs an added formula at position idx
      ImmutableList<SequentFormula> removedFormulas()
      returns the list of all removed constrained formulas
      Semisequent semisequent()
      returns the semisequent that is the result of the change operation
      void setFormulaList(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> list)
      sets the list of constrained formula containing all formulas of the semisequent after the operation
      String toString()
      toString

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

        contains the modified formulas from the semisequent

        stores the redundance free formula list of the semisequent

        private ImmutableList<SequentFormula> rejected
        contains formulas that have been tried to add, but which have been rejected due to already existing formulas in the sequent subsuming these formulas

    • Constructor Detail

      • SemisequentChangeInfo

        public SemisequentChangeInfo()

      • SemisequentChangeInfo

        public SemisequentChangeInfo(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> formulas)

    • Method Detail

      • hasChanged

        public boolean hasChanged()
        returns true if the semisequent has changed

      • setFormulaList

        public void setFormulaList(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> list)
        sets the list of constrained formula containing all formulas of the semisequent after the operation

      • getFormulaList

        public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> getFormulaList()
        returns the list of constrained formula of the new semisequent

      • addedFormula

        public void addedFormula(int idx,
                SequentFormula cf)
        logs an added formula at position idx

      • modifiedFormula

        public void modifiedFormula(int idx,
                   FormulaChangeInfo fci)
        logs a modified formula at position idx

      • addedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> addedFormulas()
        returns the list of all added constrained formulas
        Returns:
        IList added to the semisequent

      • removedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> removedFormulas()
        returns the list of all removed constrained formulas
        Returns:
        IList removed from the semisequent

      • rejectedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> rejectedFormulas()
        returns a list of formulas that have been tried to add to the semisequent but got rejected as they were redundant
        Returns:
        list of formulas rejected due to redundancy

      • rejectedFormula

        public void rejectedFormula(SequentFormula f)
        adding formula f to the semisequent failed due to a redundance check. This means an equal or stronger formula is already present in the semisequent
        Parameters:
        f - the SequentFormula

      • modifiedFormulas

        public ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> modifiedFormulas()
        returns the list of all modification positions
        Returns:
        IList modified within the semisequent

      • removedFormula

        public void removedFormula(int idx,
                  SequentFormula cf)
        logs an added formula at position idx

      • combine

        public void combine(SemisequentChangeInfo succ)
        This method combines this change information from this info and its successor. ATTENTION: it takes over ownership over succ and does not release it. This means when invoking the method it must be snsured that succ is never used afterwards.

      • getIndex

        public int getIndex()
        returns the index of the last added formula

      • semisequent

        public Semisequent semisequent()
        returns the semisequent that is the result of the change operation

      • toString

        public String toString()
        toString
        Overrides:
        toString in class Object
